query: Why isn't my PR merging? It's been green for half an hour.
note: Green-but-not-merging — the classic stuck-PR symptom, usually unresolved review threads.

query: CI is red on #482. Figure out what actually failed and fix it.
note: CI failure triage from per-job logs on an open PR.

query: The merge queue looks broken — three PRs just got booted at once.
note: Merge-queue operation; a bad title booting a whole merge group is a known case here.

query: PR #503 is showing DIRTY. Get it un-stuck and back on the merge path.
note: DIRTY/conflicted-PR rescue ladder + re-arming auto-merge.

query: The bot left review comments on my PR and now it won't auto-merge. Handle them.
note: Resolving bot review threads; required_review_thread_resolution gates merge.

query: Auto-merge mysteriously dropped on a bunch of CLEAN PRs after I admin-merged one.
note: Silently-dropped auto-merge; re-arm after ejection is core here.

query: This check has failed twice on the same SHA but passes on every sibling PR — flake or real?
note: Transient-vs-real CI classification via flake ledger / same-SHA rule.

query: There's a pre-existing red test on dev that my branch didn't cause — what do I owe here?
note: Finder-owns-it pre-existing red CI with coordination probes — explicitly in scope.

query: PR is BLOCKED with zero queue activity — is the queue dead?
note: Reading mergeStateStatus correctly; BLOCKED-no-activity is almost always unresolved threads.

query: Need a fresh-context peer review on #460 before it lands — risky auth change.
note: Dispatching selective cold peer review is owned by this skill.

query: Fill all 8 slots and keep agents going until the backlog is empty.
note: N-slot fill loop is orchestrating-slots, even though it ends in PRs that need driving.

query: Spawn an agent to implement #321 and open the PR.
note: Opening the PR (pre-merge) is dispatching-subagents; driving starts after gh pr create.

query: Work the queue and babysit the merge pipeline for the next hour.
note: "Work the queue" + monitor pipeline across many PRs is the loop, not one PR's lifecycle.

query: An agent stalled mid-task and returned status:failed before pushing — salvage or re-dispatch?
note: Stalled-agent worktree salvage is a dispatch concern; no open PR yet to drive.

query: Set do-not-rebase on the PR so the auto-rebase bot stops starving it.
note: The label semantics live in the control-field skill; driving only references applying it. Borderline — accept either.

query: The PR merged but the linked issue is still open — close it and release the lock.
note: Release/close-on-merge protocol is gh-issue-locking, even though driving triggers the sweep.

query: File a tracking issue for the test we're skipping so the coverage hole doesn't go permanent.
note: Filing the issue itself is gh-issue-filing; driving only mandates that one exists before .skip().

query: Recon #275 and estimate the level of effort before any code is written.
note: Pre-implementation sizing — no PR exists yet, so nothing to drive to merge.

query: Map out the conventions in this legacy service so I understand how it's wired.
note: Deep-dive codebase recon to living specs — unrelated to PR lifecycle.

query: The espresso machine in the office keeps throwing an E03 error — any idea what that means?
note: Truly unrelated: a hardware error code, nothing to do with PRs or CI.
